data.body:
/rebar-debug Jira-sync investigation — LIVE-VALIDATED oracles (2026-07-17). User directive: derisk every step against live Jira; avoid the chronic pattern of incomplete fixes on wrong oracles.

CONFIRMED (all runtime/live-verified):
- P1 comments: get_comments() (acli_cli_ops.py:516 + acli.py:653) omits --paginate -> returns oldest 50 of N. Non-idempotent re-posting inflated 13 tickets to Jira's 5000-comment cap (local 22-76 vs Jira 5000). ORACLE (live): `acli comment list --paginate --json` returns 101 CONCATENATED page objects summing to 5000 -> naive json.loads(stdout) CRASHES; fix must parse multi-page. search_issues (acli.py:428) plain json.loads on paginate = latent sibling.
- P2 inbound links: _diff_links_inbound (inbound_differ.py:519-527) AND _diff_link_removals (outbound_links.py:198-203) invert inward/outward->blocks/depends_on. LIVE truth (REB-458 '0250 blocks ba7e'): outwardIssue+Blocks=>blocks; inwardIssue+Blocks=>depends_on. Current code does OPPOSITE (confirmed running current code on real REB-461 JSON). Latent since f6687adf4 (06-15); UNMASKED by outbound fix 6b25dbead/43d154523 (07-16/17).
  INCOMPLETE-FIX TRAP (measured on 17 real tickets): pure branch-swap kills the 30 cycle-rejections but emits ~all MIRROR-adds (~400 store-wide). COMPLETE FIX = swap both sites + INVERSE-AWARE CROSS-TICKET dedup (emit only if X<->Y absent in either form: X has (blocks,Y) OR Y has (depends_on,X)). compute_inbound_mutations already has local_tickets_by_id -> feasible.
- Observability: acli `comment create` on capped ticket prints Failure but EXITS 0 (live). Body-parsed failures must count as failures, not be swallowed.
WRONG ORACLES IN TESTS: test_reconcile_roundtrip.py:522 + test_link_dedup.py:198 assert 'X blocks Y'=>inwardIssue — CONTRADICTED by live Jira (outwardIssue). Pre-fix reversed convention; must correct.
Worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-jira-sync-fixes (fix/jira-reconciler-sync). Epic 58b0; P1 bug 1f3d. Holding code edits for chronic-history review + complete fix design.
